properties.name: Feature: 2E KPI - Kits, Parcels, and Items
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Replaces the unused Weapon tab on Kits (Warrior Kits / Backgrounds) with a Parcels tab. Drag Treasure Parcels directly onto a Kit to link them (drag the same Parcel on twice for multiple copies); dropping the Kit onto a character unpacks every linked Parcel onto the character, granting its items and coin.

announcement.text: 2E KPI (Kits, Parcels, and Items) - Version 1.0 by sirkerry
